prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为14870→16828→20620→25017→27457，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约12587名，近3年累计后移约6837名；2025年基准位次约 27457名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年48人、2022年49人、2023年53人、2024年46人、2025年49人，2026年计划53人，较2025年扩招4人（+8 .16%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国传媒大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第82名，近年排名稳定在80–92名区 间，属于传媒类顶尖院校；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++学科排名），2026年周期偏负面（宿舍火灾事件）；抖音热度排名第11位（高热）；无 历史投档断档记录；新闻传播学为A+学科，与物理类招生的传播学、广播电视学、国际新闻与传播等专业对应；计算机科学与技术、人工智能等工科专业虽无A 类学科评估，但依托传媒行业特色有差异化优势。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年评估为"高热推荐"，计算机类"推荐"但热度明显降温；广东省2026年物理类考 生456,000人，较2025年440,208人增加约15,792人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；中国 传媒大学位于北京，广东省考生对北京高校有较强地域偏好；该校物理类招生专业涵盖数字媒体技术、计算机、人工智能等热门工科方向，对物理类考生有吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次持续后移趋势、2026年扩招8.16%对竞争的缓解、本省考生小幅增加（+3.6%）、声誉偏负面但抖音高热、电子信息/通信类专业热度较高等因素，预计2026年 物理类最低位次在2025年27457名基础上因扩招效应而小幅后移；预测最低位次约28752名，区间28252–29252名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 14870 → 16828 → 20620 → 25017 → 27457, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 12,587 places over the past 5 years and approximately 6,837 places over the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 27,457; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 48 in 2021, 49 in 2022, 53 in 2023, 46 in 2024, 49 in 2025, and 53 in 2026, an increase of 4 students (+8.16%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion that alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Communication University of China is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking range of 80–92 in recent years, making it a top-tier institution in the media field; the reputation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), while the 2026 cycle was relatively negative (dormitory fire incident); Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat); no historical record of admission cutoff drops; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline, corresponding to majors such as Communication, Radio and Television, and International Journalism and Communication enrolled in Physics Category; engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence, though not rated as A-class disciplines, have differentiated advantages based on the media industry characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were rated as 'highly recommended' in 2024, while Computer majors were 'recommended' but with significantly cooling popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong Province is 456,000, an increase of approximately 15,792 (+3.6%) from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; Communication University of China is located in Beijing, and Guangdong examinees have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities; the Physics Category enrollment majors include popular engineering directions such as Digital Media Technology, Computer Science, and Artificial Intelligence, which are attractive to Physics Category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of Physics Category rankings, the 8.16% enrollment expansion in 2026 alleviating competition, a slight increase in local examinees (+3.6%), a negative reputation but high Douyin popularity, and the relatively high popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 27,457 due to the expansion effect; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28,752, with a range of 28,252–29,252.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 28,252–29,252, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 28,000), you can focus on popular engineering majors such as Digital Media Technology and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 29,000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Communication and Communication Engineering, with Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1548 → 2741 → 2913 → 3819 → 3331, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, peaking at 3819 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 3331 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1783 places over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3331. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong was 18 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 21 in 2025, with a plan of 21 for 2026, unchanged from 2025, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Communication University of China is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking 82nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 80–92 range in recent years, making it a top-tier institution in media studies; the reputation cycle for the 2025 Gaokao is relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking), while the 2026 cycle is relatively negative (dormitory fire incident reflecting insufficient campus safety management); Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), with celebrity effects from Feng Lin, He Junlin, etc., enhancing exposure; no signal of a cutoff anomaly in historical admission records; Journalism and Communication is an A+ discipline (top nationally), highly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Advertising, Communication, Journalism, and Network and New Media, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors was assessed as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023 (Zhang Xuefeng effect), but Communication University of China, as an industry leader, was relatively less affected; the number of History Category candidates in Guangdong in 2026 is 326,200, an increase of about 34,000 (+11.6%) from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Communication University of China is located in Beijing (not in the province), and Guangdong candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities; the proportion of Guangdong in the university's national enrollment is at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in provincial candidates (+11.6%), the negative reputation but high Douyin heat, and the attraction of the A+ Journalism and Communication discipline, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 ranking of 3331; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3381, with a range of 2881–3881.
